summary: W1491 refines the W1490 W987 construction surface by replacing the endpoint kernel-equality family with separate forward and backward implication families. It reconstructs the endpoint kernel equivalence from those fields, preserves the endpoint cokernel-top split, unit mapping-cone cokernel-top split, unit mapping-cone kernel-equality split, unit mapping-cone closed-embedding split, endpoint closed-embedding split, selected-difference pi1, pi2, and pi3 splits plus mapped-cokernel, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, normalized lift object-image, and localized right-adjoint functor splits, and feeds the resulting data through the W1477 route while reassembling W718, W973, W945, W730, W986, and W987. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.
